modules.description: Validate input payload structural integrity and signed envelope shape.
modules.determinism_notes: Pure payload validation with deterministic error ordering.

modules.description: Validate deterministic envelope sequence monotonicity and gap/duplication behavior.
modules.determinism_notes: Sequence checks use deterministic ordering keys only.

modules.description: Validate intent authority against LawProfile and server authority contract.
modules.determinism_notes: Rule lookup is registry-ordered and reproducible.

modules.description: Validate tick and composite hash anchor continuity.
modules.determinism_notes: Hash comparison is deterministic by canonical serialization.

modules.description: Detect envelope replay or stale snapshot reuse across submission windows.
modules.determinism_notes: Replay windows are deterministic tick ranges.

modules.description: Server-side deterministic behavioral heuristics over aggregated event traces.
modules.determinism_notes: Heuristic thresholds are policy data; no stochastic scoring.

modules.description: Optional client attestation verification module (off by default).
modules.determinism_notes: Optional module; enabled only by explicit anti-cheat policy.
